hero.name: Le Ba Hau
hero.description: Full-Stack Developer experienced in building web applications with ReactJS, NextJS, and NodeJS. Passionate about performance optimization, clean code, and delivering high-quality systems.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know me better
about.description: I'm a Full-Stack Developer experienced in building web applications with ReactJS, NextJS, and NodeJS. Skilled in end-to-end development including Frontend UI, Backend APIs, database architecture, and cloud deployment. Passionate about performance optimization, writing maintainable code, and delivering high-quality systems.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: My professional journey
experience.projectDesc: A large-scale management system for educational institutions, supporting operations between schools, teachers, and students.

responsibilities.frontend: Built responsive frontend features using ReactJS, NextJS, and TypeScript from Figma designs.
responsibilities.backend: Designed and implemented backend APIs using NodeJS (NestJS/Express) for student records, schedules, and learning workflows.
responsibilities.auth: Implemented JWT authentication and Role-Based Access Control (RBAC).
responsibilities.api: Integrated RESTful APIs using TanStack Query for optimized data fetching and caching.
responsibilities.performance: Improved application performance by 25% through code splitting, lazy loading, and state management optimization.
responsibilities.shared: Developed shared UI components and custom hooks to increase development efficiency.

ems.title: Education Management System (EMS)
ems.description: A large-scale management system for educational institutions with frontend and backend modules, JWT authentication, RBAC, and performance optimization.

melodix.title: Melodix - Online Music Streaming Platform
melodix.description: A full-stack music streaming platform with SSR for SEO optimization, AWS S3 for audio storage and streaming, deployed with Docker, AWS EC2 and CI/CD.

nexamart.title: Nexa-mart - AI Retail Platform
nexamart.description: Admin dashboard with ReactJS and mobile app with React Native. Integrated Gemini AI API for customer support chatbot and PayOS payment gateway. Achieved Excellent grade and published paper at SSRC 2025.

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
portfolio.description: A modern, responsive portfolio website built with React, TypeScript, and Framer Motion for smooth animations.

pcstore.title: PC & Electronic Components Store Website
pcstore.description: A microservices-based e-commerce system with core services including Product, User, Payment, and ChatAI.

zaloclone.title: Zalo Clone Chat Application
zaloclone.description: A cross-platform real-time messaging application replicating core features of a modern social chat platform. Supports 1-on-1, group chat, and media sharing.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's work together
contact.description: I'm currently looking for new opportunities. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!
